title: Smoke heimlern over Chronik-shaped outcomes
goal: Implement or verify a review-only smoke in heimlern that consumes Chronik-shaped outcome exports and produces an auditable report/proposal result without applying policy.

acceptance.assertion: The smoke consumes a Chronik-shaped export artifact rather than private ad-hoc fixture assumptions.
Any produced proposal validates against the pinned policy.weight_adjustment.v1 contract or records insufficient evidence.
The smoke writes no routing policy and preserves no-auto-apply non-claims.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
